note: Mathlib/Topology/Sion.lean:444 -- Sion.minimax proves the Sion-von Neumann minimax theorem for complete linear orders; file docstring explicitly notes 'As a particular case, one get[s] the von Neumann theorem' and a TODO to 'Spell out the particular case of von Neumann theorem' is still open, so the classical (von Neumann) minimax theorem the QID denotes is a special case not yet spelled out -- generalization, not exact.

Mathlib/NumberTheory/ArithmeticFunction/Misc.lean:143 -- `def sigma (k : ℕ) : ArithmeticFunction ℕ := ⟨fun n => ∑ d ∈ divisors n, d ^ k, ...⟩`, docstring 'σ k n is the sum of the kth powers of the divisors of n' -- this IS the divisor function (sigma function).

Mathlib/NumberTheory/NumberField/ClassNumber.lean:64 -- `noncomputable def classNumber : ℕ := Fintype.card (ClassGroup (𝓞 K))`, docstring 'the class number of a number field is the (finite) cardinality of the class group of its ring of integers' -- the standard definition of class number.
